name: Personality Psychology Premium
short_description: Discover your true self with 35+ in-depth personality tests plus dozens of fun quizzes! Explore psychology & self-awareness with friends. Compare results with up to 5 players. Entertaining, insightful and revealing. 4K@120FPS*
detailed_description:
Personality Psychology Premium is the ultimate personality quiz collection on Steam. With over 35 serious, in-depth tests (each featuring 30-40 thought-provoking questions) plus dozens of fun quick quizzes, this is the most comprehensive personality app you'll find. Explore hidden sides of your character across five fascinating categories: your inner world, your social self, your actions, your beliefs, and your intimate side.

Each serious test dives deep — 30 to 40 carefully crafted questions that build a detailed picture of who you really are. The fun quizzes are lighter and faster, perfect for quick sessions or playing with friends. Every test ends with a detailed scorecard revealing your personality analysis. Are you truly happy? Are you adventurous or cautious? A risk-taker or a thinker? Find out in minutes.

► THE INSIDE: Happiness, self-esteem, freedom, stress, health, guilt and more.

► THE OUTSIDE: Ambition, adventure, stubbornness, peace of mind and more.

► THE ACTIONS: Responsibility, risk-taking, energy, shyness, wisdom and more.

► THE OTHERS: Tolerance, open-mindedness, beliefs, worldview and more.

► THE SEX: Satisfaction, attitudes, identity and more.

But the real fun starts with friends. Add up to 5 players and take the tests together. Compare scorecards, spark conversations, and break the ice at any gathering. It's the perfect party starter and the best way to learn more about the people you think you already know.

Win trophies based on the tests you complete. Challenge yourself to finish them all and unlock every achievement.

Whether you're on a journey of self-discovery, looking for a unique social activity, or just curious about what makes you tick — Personality Psychology Premium delivers hundreds of questions, hours of entertainment, and genuine insight.

Features:

✦ 4K 2D Cartoon - 4K@120FPS* / 4K@60FPS (* Requires >= 120Hz TV/Monitor & 2.1 HDMI)

✦ 35+ serious in-depth tests (30-40 questions each) plus dozens of fun quick quizzes.

✦ Multiplayer mode: add up to 5 friends and compare results side by side.

✦ Detailed scorecards with personality analysis after every test.

✦ Trophies and Steam Achievements to collect.

✦ Light, funny, and never boring — designed to entertain.

✦ Perfect icebreaker for parties, gatherings, and game nights.

✦ Translated into 7 languages.
